items.title: Why C3.ai Stock Was Climbing Today
items.author: Jeremy Bowman
items.description: C3.ai stock rose in anticipation of its upcoming earnings report, as cloud software stocks like Salesforce reported strong results, indicating growing adoption of AI tools. Analysts are expecting 24.3% revenue growth for C3.ai, but the company remains unprofitable.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: C3.ai's stock rose in anticipation of its upcoming earnings report, as the company's revenue growth has been accelerating and the adoption of AI software is expected to increase.
Salesforce, the largest pure-play cloud software stock, reported strong results and touted the adoption of its AI tools, which is seen as a positive sign for C3.ai and other software stocks.

items.title: Tech Stocks Extend Record Highs On AI Optimism, Marvell Rockets, Bitcoin Hovers Near $95,000: What's Driving Markets Wednesday?
items.author: Piero Cingari, Benzinga Staff Writer
items.description: Tech stocks continued their rally, with the Nasdaq 100 and S&P 500 hitting new record highs. Investor optimism around AI-driven growth fueled the gains, led by strong performance in Amazon. However, economic data showed slower-than-expected growth in the services sector and private payroll numbers.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Amazon's stock advanced over 2% on the back of strong early holiday sales and optimism around AI advancements showcased at the AWS annual conference.
Salesforce's stock rose over 7% in reaction to its quarterly results, which delivered slightly lower-than-expected earnings.
Pure Storage's stock jumped 24% in response to its earnings report.
Okta's stock increased 4.8% after its earnings announcement.
Dollar Tree's stock rose 2.4% in reaction to its earnings.
Chewy's stock fell 3.8% after its earnings announcement.
The Technology Select Sector SPDR Fund outperformed the broader market, rising 1.6%.
The Energy Select Sector SPDR Fund lagged the market, declining 2.4%.
